data.title: Anthropic futures shrug off Coinbase debut and hit fresh lows
data.summary: Anthropic pre-IPO futures fell up to 9% after Coinbase debut, hitting new lows on Coinbase and Binance amid SpaceX IPO concerns.

content: As reported by crypto.news, Coinbase [added](https://crypto.news/coinbase-pre-ipo-perps-spacex-openai-anthropic/) Anthropic and OpenAI pre-IPO perpetual
[Anthropic (ANTHROPIC/USDT) 4-hour chart showing a sharp selloff to a record low near $1,545 before a partial rebound toward $1,640.]
summary: Anthropic pre-IPO futures fell up to 9% after Coinbase debut, hitting new lows on Coinbase and Binance amid SpaceX IPO concerns.
title: Anthropic futures shrug off Coinbase debut and hit fresh lows

data.title: U.S. Government Abruptly Halts Anthropic’s Most Advanced Model; “Pre-…
data.summary: U.S. government ordered Anthropic to shut down Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models June 12 over alleged jailbreak vulnerability; Anthropic called it a misunderstanding and plans to restore access.

content: Anthropic disclosed it received the directive at 5:21 p.m.
That’s a bitter pill to swallow—and Anthropic made its dissatisfaction public.
summary: U.S. government ordered Anthropic to shut down Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models June 12 over alleged jailbreak vulnerability; Anthropic called it a misunderstanding and plans to restore access.

data.title: Bitget has launched the Anthropic pre-market perpetual contract, supporting up to 20x leverage

data.title: Is zero-marginal-cost tech no more?
data.summary: OpenAI undercuts Anthropic with cheaper GPT-5; Anthropic holds 32% enterprise share, raises $13B; Aug MEV: Solana $68M, Ethereum $32.5M

content: Your “software” rides on someone else’s model (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, etc).
In enterprise usage share, Anthropic has overtaken OpenAI — 32% vs. OpenAI’s 25% by usage. !
summary: OpenAI undercuts Anthropic with cheaper GPT-5; Anthropic holds 32% enterprise share, raises $13B; Aug MEV: Solana $68M, Ethereum $32.5M

data.title: Anthropic rejects PreStocks tokens as shares void
data.summary: Anthropic and OpenAI declared Solana PreStocks tokens backed by their shares worthless, triggering drops of up to 39% as unauthorized SPV transfers lack legal validity.

content: “We do not permit special purpose vehicles to acquire Anthropic stock and any transfer of shares to an SPV are void under our transfer restrictions,” Anthropic
PreStocks holds just over $333,000 in stablecoins and $18,000 in SOL to back Anthropic-linked tokens.
summary: Anthropic and OpenAI declared Solana PreStocks tokens backed by their shares worthless, triggering drops of up to 39% as unauthorized SPV transfers lack legal validity.
title: Anthropic rejects PreStocks tokens as shares void
